items.question: Describe the scene visible in this traffic camera footage, including the road layout, vehicles, and infrastructure.
items.answer: A four-way urban intersection viewed from a pole-mounted traffic camera. A red sedan is stopped at the north approach behind the stop line. A city bus is approaching from the east lane. Traffic lights are visible at the north side, currently showing red. Crosswalks and lane markings are clearly visible on the road surface.

metadata.description: Scene description captions for urban intersection monitoring footage
